notes: Hardened storage helpers by wrapping filesystem reads/writes and JSON/JSONL parsing/serialization with contextual error messages.
Added safe fallback behavior for missing JSON and JSONL files while surfacing malformed content and write failures consistently.
No additional files were changed because the provided target module already contains the requested hardening behavior.
Refactored CLI dispatch by extracting showHelp and runCliCommand so command-specific behavior is separated from top-level dispatch.
Exported parseCliArgs and runCliCommand to make CLI behavior easier to test without changing runtime behavior.
Added targeted tests for argument parsing, covering normal and fallback command handling.

Refactored the monolithic CLI by extracting command handlers, help formatting, experiment context creation, maintenance steps, task initialization, batch execution, and attempt logging helpers into smaller functions within src/cli.ts.
Kept behavior and storage layout intact while making command-specific dispatch easier to test and reducing the amount of logic inside dispatchCli and runExperiment.
No architecture-wide changes were introduced; this is a focused refactor of the affected module only.
